# Evidence Strength Rubric for Network Maths

## Weak evidence

One anomaly:

- a burst
- similar captions
- high views
- repeated hashtag
- thin account

## Moderate evidence

Two or three converging anomalies:

- burst + similar content
- reused media + same hashtag
- repeated account overlap + no disclosure

## Strong evidence

Multiple converging anomalies plus statistical unusualness:

- dense graph
- high repeated co-action weights
- low entropy
- null-model p-value small
- repeated across multiple objects

## Documented evidence

Network evidence plus external confirmation:

- regulator action
- platform enforcement
- leaked campaign brief
- public operator admission
- credible investigative reporting
- payment/incentive evidence

## Always include

- limitations
- false positives
- safe wording
